summary: Inspected the sibling datalox-replay-fixture directory and updated the engine plan so Phase 2 consumes the existing fixture manifest contract instead of inventing a parallel fixture pack format.

agentTurn.user_prompt: for Fixture worlds / fixture sets next: users run agents inside declared replay worlds, not raw bundle paths., look at datalox-replay-fixture/
agentTurn.assistant_summary: Inspected /Users/yifanjin/datalox-replay-fixture. It is not a git repo, but it already contains five verified fixture packs, fixture manifests, eval prompts, expected behavior docs, replay bundles, schemas, and validation/packing scripts. Updated docs/local-to-server-engine-plan.html to describe the existing sibling fixture repo, list the observed packs, record that npm test passes there, change Phase 2 to accept the current fixture repo manifest shape, and make fixture sets the missing layer to add after single-fixture install/replay works.

tool_calls.output_summary: Fixture repo tests passed: 7 node:test cases, 5 fixture packs listed, 5 fixture packs validated, pack command help passed.
Engine repo focused docs and identity gates passed: 2 files, 12 tests.
Engine repo TypeScript no-emit check passed.

file_changes.diff_summary: Changed the fixture repo from hypothetical to existing. Added Fixture Repo Reality Check with the five observed packs and validation result. Updated Phase 2 to use replayFixtureManifestSchema/readFixtureManifest, match the fixture repo manifest fields, use 2026-05.0 version syntax, and make fixture sets the next missing layer rather than duplicating fixture-pack schemas.

verification.command: cd ../datalox-replay-fixture && PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:$PATH" npm test && cd ../datalox-pack-trajectory-export && PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:$PATH" npx vitest run tests/replayCanonicalDocs.test.ts tests/repoIdentity.test.ts && PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:$PATH" npm run check && git diff --check
verification.evidence: Fixture repo: 7 tests passed, 5 fixtures listed and validated. Engine repo: focused docs/identity gates passed, TypeScript no-emit check passed, git diff --check passed.
